name: AIR LIQUIDE ADR 1/5/EO 11
summary: AIR LIQUIDE ADR 1/5/EO 11 represents an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) for Air Liquide, a French multinational company specializing in industrial gases and services. The ADR allows US investors to invest in Air Liquide shares which may be 1/5th of one Air Liquide share with a par value of 11 euros. Air Liquide supplies gases, technologies and services for industry and health.
